text:
I just committed some patches in net-p2p/eisk*=20

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/162340

I don't think it will help, but I think standard on 8.x is gcc45 now, isn't=
 it?
(looks like standard on 7.4 is gcc42)

So this won't compile on 7.4 unless you install 'a new copy of gcc' all ove=
r again.
